程序包 mypakege

类 Section

java.lang.Object
mypakege.Section
public class Section extends Object
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

    说明

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Section(Course course, int period, Instructor instructor, Classroom classroom)
    Creates a section with a fixed roster capacity of 4 students.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    boolean
    containsStudent(Profile p)
    Checks whether a student with the given profile is in this section.
    boolean
    drop(Profile p)
    Drops a student (by profile) from the roster.
    boolean
    enroll(Student s)
    Enrolls a student if the section is not full and the student is not already enrolled.
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
    Two sections are equal if they have the same course and the same period.
    Classroom
    getClassroom()
    Returns the classroom of this section.
    Course
    getCourse()
    Returns the course of this section.
    int
    getEnrolled()
    Returns the number of currently enrolled students.
    Instructor
    getInstructor()
    Returns the instructor of this section.
    int
    getPeriod()
    Returns the period number of this section.
    boolean
    hasStudent(Profile p)
    Checks whether a student with the given profile is enrolled in this section.
    boolean
    isFull()
    Checks whether the section roster is full (capacity is 4).
    void
    printRoster()
    Prints the roster of this section to the console.
    String
    toString()
    Returns the formatted string representation of this section.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • course

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Section

      public Section(Course course, int period, Instructor instructor, Classroom classroom)
      Creates a section with a fixed roster capacity of 4 students.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getCourse

      public Course getCourse()
      Returns the course of this section.

    • getPeriod

      public int getPeriod()
      Returns the period number of this section.

    • getInstructor

      public Instructor getInstructor()
      Returns the instructor of this section.

    • getClassroom

      public Classroom getClassroom()
      Returns the classroom of this section.

    • getEnrolled

      public int getEnrolled()
      Returns the number of currently enrolled students.

    • isFull

      public boolean isFull()
      Checks whether the section roster is full (capacity is 4).

    • hasStudent

      public boolean hasStudent(Profile p)
      Checks whether a student with the given profile is enrolled in this section.

    • enroll

      public boolean enroll(Student s)
      Enrolls a student if the section is not full and the student is not already enrolled. Returns true if enrollment succeeds; otherwise returns false.

    • drop

      public boolean drop(Profile p)
      Drops a student (by profile) from the roster. Returns true if the student is found and removed; otherwise returns false.

    • containsStudent

      public boolean containsStudent(Profile p)
      Checks whether a student with the given profile is in this section. This is an alias of hasStudent(Profile).

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Two sections are equal if they have the same course and the same period.
      覆盖:
      equals 在类中 Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the formatted string representation of this section.
      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object

    • printRoster

      public void printRoster()
      Prints the roster of this section to the console.
